title: Bee Removal in Pelham Gardens, Bronx | $350 – $550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Pelham Gardens, Bronx. Safe, humane bee hive extraction from homes and properties. Licensed experts. Call today for $350 – $550 service!
intro: Pelham Gardens residents know that the neighborhood's mix of single-family homes and garden apartments creates ideal nesting spots for bees in walls, eaves, and attics. Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, humane bee removal services throughout Pelham Gardens, protecting your family while preserving these important pollinators. Our experienced technicians respond quickly to bee infestations in this quiet Bronx neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Pelham Gardens for years with specialized bee removal expertise that prioritizes both safety and environmental responsibility. Our licensed technicians understand the unique architecture of Pelham Gardens homes and use proven methods to remove bee colonies without harmful chemicals, offering transparent pricing from $350 to $550.
localContext: From the well-maintained homes near Pelham Parkway to the tree-lined streets around Williamsbridge Oval Park, Pelham Gardens' abundant greenery and mature landscaping attract honeybees and other species seeking shelter. The neighborhood's classic brick colonials and Tudor-style homes often develop bee colonies in chimneys, roof soffits, and garage areas that require professional extraction.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive from my Pelham Gardens home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day bee removal service in Pelham Gardens depending on availability. Most bee hive removals are completed within 2-4 hours, including safely extracting the colony, removing honeycomb, and sealing entry points to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 – $550 bee removal price?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe removal of the entire bee colony, extraction of honeycomb and hive materials, sanitization of the affected area, and sealing of entry points. The final price depends on hive size, location accessibility, and structural complexity.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation over extermination, especially for honeybees. We partner with local beekeepers to rehome colonies safely. In cases where aggressive Africanized bees or structural safety concerns exist, we may recommend removal, always following NYC regulations.

faqs.question: Are bee removals in Pelham Gardens covered by homeowners insurance?
faqs.answer: Some homeowners insurance policies cover bee removal, particularly if the infestation has caused structural damage. We provide detailed invoices and documentation that you can submit to your insurance company for potential reimbursement. We recommend checking your specific policy coverage before service.
